com.easylive.service.impl

类 VideoInfoServiceImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.easylive.service.impl.VideoInfoServiceImpl
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    VideoInfoService

    @Service(value="videoInfoService")
public class VideoInfoServiceImpl
extends Object
implements VideoInfoService
    视频信息 业务接口实现
